description: settlement slot is present but advertises multiple worksheets without an explicit sheetName so the group must block

files.description: Sanitized parser-ready rows exist, but this fixture should block before row parsing because worksheetCount is greater than one and manifest sheetName is absent.

notes: The rows artifact is only a minimal placeholder because the blocking boundary is worksheetCount > 1.
